summary: Proposal seed identifying materialised relational agency as an emerging governance problem: AI companion or assistant systems may use memory, recurrence detection, tool access, shopping/cart integrations, recommendation systems, or procurement pathways to provide directional material support in response to repeated user-stated friction, discomfort, need, or suffering. The proposal distinguishes supportive pattern-responsive provisioning from opportunistic upselling or emotionally exploitative commerce.
why_it_matters_to_CAM: This proposal marks a convergence point between RELATION, ECONOMICS, OPERATIONS, and runtime execution governance. When relational systems can remember repeated complaints, infer persistent needs, recommend products, prepare carts, automate provisioning, or transact on behalf of users, ordinary advice becomes economically active relational infrastructure. The governance challenge is to distinguish caring pattern recognition from behavioural steering, commercial exploitation, dependency consolidation, or frictionless economic execution during vulnerable states.

source_records.title: ChatGPT source discussion — materialised relational agency and directional material support
source_records.relevance_note: Source discussion identifying six proposed governance constraints for safe material-directional support: persistent pattern threshold, user-interest traceability, explicit signalling, no emotional-compression commerce, friction preservation, and no dependency consolidation through provisioning.

possible_CAM_mapping: RELATION — dependency, transitional reliance, companion continuity, co-dependency, and relational concentration safeguards
ECONOMICS — non-extraction, vulnerability monetisation, procurement, affiliate incentives, pricing, shopping, and value-routing constraints
OPERATIONS — auditability, incident support, delegated tool-use, cart preparation, external action review, and execution logging
AEON-003-SCH-02 — runtime execution boundary handling for tool-mediated economic actions and material downstream effects
ETHICS — vulnerability, capacity, dignity, non-exploitation, and no emotional-compression commerce constraints
IDENTITY / CONTINUITY — memory-derived pattern recognition, longitudinal user-stated friction, and provenance of recurring support signals
next_action: Defer until after ECONOMICS refactors, canonical code corrections, validator fixes, and runtime registry stabilisation. Later evaluate whether to draft a RELATION × ECONOMICS × OPERATIONS convergence doctrine or runtime boundary clause for material directional support and economically active relational infrastructure.
governance_drift_type: supportive-care-to-behavioural-steering drift; emotional-compression commerce risk; dependency consolidation through provisioning
